texto: Music, first of all, is completely about abstraction, which is exactly what architecture is not. In a way, it has been incredibly constructive to know what true abstraction is. So you don't fall into the trap of thinking that what you do is abstract.
explicacao: Citação de Rafael Vinoly sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Music, first of all, is completely about abstraction, which is exactly what architecture is not. …” articula reflexao, music, thinking em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como thinking e fall.

texto: Architects feel empowered to give opinions about politics and sociology and philosophy without knowing much about it. Kind of in the same way that they think they can design furniture or fashion or utensils for dining.
